title: Tether froze $4.2B in tokens tied to illicit activity in 3 years: Report
summary: Tether blocked billions in USDt tied to scams and laundering cases as authorities increasingly rely on stablecoin issuers to halt suspicious funds.

title: Bitcoin price drops to $63K as US, Israel launch airstrikes on Iran
summary: Bitcoin faced geopolitical instability alone as a weekend move on Iran saw traditional markets closed, with key support still holding.

title: OpenAI wins defense contract hours after government ditches Anthropic
summary: OpenAI will deploy its AI models on Pentagon classified networks after the US government ordered agencies to stop using rival Anthropic over national security concerns.

title: Mt. Gox’s former CEO floats hard fork to recover 80K hacked Bitcoin
summary: Mark Karpelès said it has been 12 years since the start of Mt. Gox’s bankruptcy proceedings and “this is probably the last sore point on this whole case.”

title: Crypto VC Paradigm expands into AI, robotics with $1.5B fund: WSJ
summary: Paradigm's Matt Huang previously said developments in AI were "too interesting to ignore" and that both AI and crypto will have plenty of overlap.

title: Digital Assets Lose $73B Since October 2025 Highs, CoinShares Finds
summary: Short Bitcoin funds attracted $14.5 million in inflows as investors hedge against falling prices.
